mapper.insert: insert into osh_course_buy (user_id, course_id, order_no, pay_status, pay_method, pay_price, origin_price, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{courseId}, #{orderNo}, 'pending', #{payMethod}, #{payPrice}, #{originPrice}, 0, 'system', now(), 'system', now()) on duplicate key update order_no = values(order_no), pay_status = 'pending', pay_method = values(pay_method), pay_price = values(pay_price), origin_price = values(origin_price), delete_flag = 0, update_by = 'system', update_time = now()
mapper.update: update osh_course_buy set pay_status = 'paid', pay_time = now(), delete_flag = 0, update_by = 'system', update_time = now() where order_no = #{orderNo} and user_id = #{userId}
